name: Vertex compat (php + dotnet)
//: compat/hello/run-php.sh expects the implementation repos as siblings of Vertex, matching its ../../.. preflight. VS Code mounts the opened folder (Vertex); we bind-mount the two implementation repos alongside. Adjust the host source paths below if your clones live elsewhere.
postCreateCommand: dotnet --version && php -v && php -m | grep -i swoole && composer --version && protoc --version && go version
